pickup.name: Stabilizing Salt
pickup.effect: Neutralizes acidic gas hazards and slows enemy movement

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Orderly reveals the heavy iron key required to enter the restricted archives.

pickup.name: Blazing Sulfur Powder
pickup.effect: Inflicts lingering fire damage upon throwing

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Librarian triggers a mechanism that clears the collapsed ceiling blocking the path to the crypt.

pickup.name: Prismatic Catalyst
pickup.effect: Amplifies chemical reactions and pierces ethereal armor

encounters.trigger: Banishing the Warden dispels the final protective seal guarding the Alchemist's laboratory.

boss.name: The Alchemist's Abomination
boss.victory_condition: Apply the Prismatic Catalyst to expose the core of the abomination, then land a final strike.

level.objective: Purge the corruption from the apothecary and defeat the rogue creation of the master alchemist.
level.reward: The Grand Transmutation Stone and an elixir of eternal longevity.

pickup.name: Blessed Oil
pickup.effect: Increases burn duration

encounters.trigger: Burning the barricade opens the path to the cloisters

pickup.name: Corrupted Sigil
pickup.effect: Provides immunity to shadow aura

encounters.trigger: Clearing the shadow reveals the inner crypt entrance

pickup.name: Abyssal Heart
pickup.effect: Key to the ritual altar

encounters.trigger: Placing the heart on the pedestal summons the boss

boss.name: Cathedral Patriarch
boss.victory_condition: Purify the patriarch using the heart to end the ritual

level.objective: Purify the cathedral by defeating the Patriarch

encounters.hazard: Flickering lights that disorient the player

pickup.name: Spectral Essence
pickup.effect: Allows the player to pass through spectral barriers

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Orderly reveals a key card to the Laboratory

encounters.hazard: Toxic gas vents cycling in the room

pickup.name: Cursed Monocle
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden traps and enemy weak points

encounters.trigger: The death of the patient triggers a fire alarm that unlocks the Operating Theater

encounters.hazard: Jagged scalpel blades embedded in the floor

pickup.name: Silver Heart Valve
pickup.effect: A heavy artifact used to stop the boss's life-sustaining machines

encounters.trigger: The Nurse's defeat dispels the magical barrier guarding the Surgeon's Inner Sanctum

boss.name: The Asylum Matriarch
boss.victory_condition: Use the Silver Heart Valve to jam the Matriarch's mechanical heart while she is stunned

level.objective: Escape the Asylum by deactivating the Matriarch's containment seal

pickup.name: Heavy Hunting Boots
pickup.effect: Increased movement speed and resistance to difficult terrain

encounters.trigger: Discovering a bloodstained map on a corpse that directs the path to the inner sanctum

pickup.name: Ancient Ritual Salt
pickup.effect: Purifies dark spirits and negates ethereal shielding

encounters.trigger: Entering the Berserker's territory triggers the massive iron door to slam shut behind the player

pickup.name: Obsidian Keystone
pickup.effect: Used to power the ancient seal mechanism at the heart of the forest

encounters.trigger: The death of the Wisp releases a keyhole mechanism that accepts the Obsidian Keystone to access the Boss chamber

boss.name: The Hollow Warden
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Obsidian Keystone into the altar while the Warden is incapacitated to seal its connection to the void

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of the Woods and purge the supernatural rot from the forest
level.reward: A sacred Ranger's Badge of Valor and the forest's eternal silence

pickup.name: Bottled Moonlight
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding glow that reveals hidden paths

encounters.trigger: Defeating the scribe reveals a secret compartment containing the Bottled Moonlight

pickup.name: Petrified Heart
pickup.effect: Increases necrotic energy potency

encounters.trigger: The dying Tome emits a wail that unlocks the door to the Altar of Lament

pickup.name: Ancient Seal Fragment
pickup.effect: Dissolves the protective barrier of the Inner Sanctum

encounters.trigger: Using the fragment on the pedestal shatters the final barrier to the boss chamber

boss.name: High Lich of Woe
boss.victory_condition: Channel the power of the Ancient Seal Fragment to banish the Lich into the void

level.objective: Banish the High Lich of Woe
level.reward: Mastery of Necromancy and the Amulet of Eternal Slumber

pickup.name: Stun Grenade
pickup.effect: Temporarily stuns organic nervous systems

encounters.trigger: Defeating the patient drops a key card required to enter the Infirmary.

pickup.name: High-Voltage Battery
pickup.effect: Provides an electric surge to power dormant devices

encounters.trigger: The nurse's death triggers a total blackout, forcing the player to use the battery to open the Operating Theater door.

pickup.name: Heavy Lead Shield
pickup.effect: Reflects concentrated necrotic energy projectiles

encounters.trigger: Defeating the abomination causes the vault door to the Basement Sanctum to unlock.

boss.name: Director Malachi
boss.victory_condition: Reflect the boss's necrotic screams back at him using the shield to shatter his physical form.

level.objective: Purge the corrupted asylum of the madness within.
level.reward: Berserker's Eternal Rage: A permanent 50% damage boost to all future encounters.

enemy.name: Whispering Spirit
enemy.weakness: Brilliant light from the Lantern of Souls

pickup.name: Silver Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency resonance

encounters.trigger: Approaching the gate awakens the spirit, and its defeat opens the path to the mausoleum entrance

enemy.name: Echoing Wraith
enemy.weakness: Resonant vibration of the Silver Tuning Fork

pickup.name: Bottled Moonlight
pickup.effect: Used for spiritual cleansing

encounters.trigger: The Wraith's collapse breaks the seal on the inner crypt door, leading toward the central bridge

enemy.name: Hollow Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Cleansing properties of the Bottled Moonlight

pickup.name: Ceremonial Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Forbidden Crypt

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel drops the key upon defeat, clearing the way to the final boss gate

boss.name: Grave Warden Specter
boss.victory_condition: Unlock the final crypt seal to bind the Specter

level.objective: Sanctify the graveyard by sealing the forbidden crypt.

pickup.name: Glowing Gumball
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden passages

encounters.trigger: Find map to the main stage

pickup.name: Confetti Bomb
pickup.effect: Stuns mechanical constructs

encounters.trigger: Open the heavy velvet curtains

pickup.name: Gold Token
pickup.effect: Key to the manager's office

encounters.trigger: Unlock the manager's office

boss.name: The Ringmaster
boss.victory_condition: Exchange the Gold Token to unlock the exit gate

level.objective: Escape the haunted funhouse before the final act

pickup.name: Lubricant Oil
pickup.effect: Reduces mechanical friction and slows robotic foes

encounters.trigger: Defeating the rat ruptures a pipe, venting steam into the corridor

pickup.name: Copper Fuse
pickup.effect: Conducts electricity to overload mechanical systems

encounters.trigger: The automaton falling into the turbine shorts the main circuit

pickup.name: High-Pressure Regulator
pickup.effect: Increases steam output to amplify weapon impact

encounters.trigger: The guard's collapse dislodges a lock, opening the bridge doors

boss.name: Clockwork Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Sabotage the core by overloading the intake valve

level.objective: Stabilize the airship core before the vessel crashes

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Imbues the gauntlet with electrical discharge

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton initiates the hydraulic lift to the second floor

pickup.name: Crystalline Lens
pickup.effect: Reveals structural vulnerabilities in mechanical constructs

encounters.trigger: The spider’s core destruction unlocks the sealed entrance to the Observatory Dome

pickup.name: Chronos Keystone
pickup.effect: Stabilizes local time distortions

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel emits a final signal that grants access to the temporal sanctum

boss.name: The Timekeeper
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Keystone to lock the boss in a temporal stasis field

level.objective: Restore the observatory's temporal flow by defeating the corrupt Timekeeper

pickup.name: Lubricating Oil
pickup.effect: Reduces mechanical friction, useful for slowing down fast enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the cricket activates the irrigation gate to the fountain area

pickup.name: Brass Polish
pickup.effect: Increases sensitivity of clockwork components

encounters.trigger: Clearing the spider allows access to the inner conservatory control lever

pickup.name: Super-Charged Battery
pickup.effect: A high-voltage energy source for ancient mechanisms

encounters.trigger: Defeating the beetle powers the main entry door to the boss arena

boss.name: The Grand Gardener
boss.victory_condition: Short-circuit the boss's central logic processor

level.objective: Retrieve the Chronos Seed from the heart of the Grand Gardener

pickup.name: Industrial Oil Can
pickup.effect: Lubricates machinery or gums up mechanical components

encounters.trigger: Sabotaging the steam pressure valve alerts the security drone

enemy.name: Security Drone
enemy.weakness: Industrial Oil Can to jam rotors

pickup.name: Heavy Brass Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks high-security containment hatches

encounters.trigger: The destruction of the drone drops the keycard required to enter the maintenance shaft

enemy.name: Clockwork Assassin
enemy.weakness: Heavy Brass Key used to jam internal gears

pickup.name: High-Frequency Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Emits a sonic pulse that destabilizes harmonic resonance

encounters.trigger: Defeating the assassin triggers the final core release sequence for the boss

boss.name: The Steam Titan
boss.victory_condition: Disrupt the titan's internal resonance chamber using the tuning fork to force a meltdown

level.objective: Disable the central processing core to stop the factory's production of warmongering machines.

level.setting: The Cogwheel Abyss, a subterranean industrial graveyard

pickup.name: Conductive Oil
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Automaton triggers the release of the heavy rusted seal blocking the passage to the Central Forge

pickup.name: Overclock Gear
pickup.effect: Grants enhanced attack speed and electrical surge

encounters.trigger: Retiring the guard unlocks the magnetic clamp guarding the entrance to the Generator Room

pickup.name: Master Keycard
pickup.effect: Disables the central security shielding for the final chamber

encounters.trigger: Killing the Stalker initiates the sequence to lower the energy forcefield surrounding the final boss arena

boss.name: The Steam Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Keycard to disable the boss's shielding and deliver the final blow with the Tesla Staff

level.objective: Shut down the Cogwheel Abyss core to stop the atmospheric poisoning of the surface world
level.reward: Ancient Brass Prototype Armor and blueprints for a thunderous upgrade

level.setting: The derelict clockwork city of Aetheria suspended in a desolate, smog-choked sky

encounters.hazard: Rust-weakened steam pipes bursting with scalding pressure

pickup.name: Gear of Momentum
pickup.effect: Increases attack speed and kinetic force

encounters.trigger: Defeating the scavenger unlocks the blast gate leading to the Engine Core

encounters.hazard: Rotating cog platforms that shift the floor underfoot

pickup.name: Chronal Capacitor
pickup.effect: Allows temporal stasis field generation

encounters.trigger: Dismantling the sentinel triggers the main elevator lift to the spire

encounters.hazard: Leaking oil pools that ignite if touched by steam pressure

pickup.name: Aether Core
pickup.effect: Stabilizes temporal fractures

encounters.trigger: Securing the Aether Core disables the security lockdown guarding the Boss

boss.name: The Great Gear Master
boss.victory_condition: Use the Aether Core to destabilize his core clockwork heart during his charge attack

level.objective: Restore the shattered Chronos Heart to prevent the total collapse of the city
level.reward: The Time-Lock ultimate ability and the title of Chronomancer Prime

level.setting: A flooded, decaying clockwork foundry in a perpetual Victorian fog.

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Increases electrical damage discharge

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker releases a pressure valve, venting steam into the Ventilation Shaft.

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Dissolves reinforced brass plating

encounters.trigger: The Golem's collapse ruptures the floor, revealing the entrance to the Furnace Pit.

pickup.name: Ancient Heartstone
pickup.effect: Stills the clockwork pulse of ancient machines

encounters.trigger: The Mechanist’s demise forces the grand clock of the foundry to strike midnight, unlocking the Throne Room.

boss.name: The Grand Automaton Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Successfully insert the Ancient Heartstone into the Overseer's chest cavity during its vulnerability phase.

level.objective: Deactivate the foundry's runaway engine before it consumes the city.
level.reward: The Chronos Shard, granting mastery over localized time manipulation.

level.setting: A tranquil garden of brass-plated flowers and floating clockwork koi

pickup.name: Heavy Lubricant Oil
pickup.effect: Temporarily slows mechanical movement

encounters.trigger: Defeating the scout clears the debris blocking the fountain courtyard.

pickup.name: Grand Temple Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the inner sanctum and serves as a heavy blunt object

encounters.trigger: Opening the fountain gate activates the lift to the temple atrium.

pickup.name: Sun-Dial Pendant
pickup.effect: Focuses light into a concentrated beam

encounters.trigger: Removing the sentinel unlocks the main doors to the boss's arena.

boss.name: The Chrono-Warden
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sun-Dial Pendant to blind the Warden's sensors and expose its core.

level.objective: Restore the peace to the clockwork garden by deactivating the rogue Warden.
level.reward: The Eternal Spring Gear, capable of powering any steam-based mechanism indefinitely.
